<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace PHPUnit\Architecture\Storage; use PHPUnit\Architecture\Elements\ObjectDescription; use PHPUnit\Architecture\Services\ServiceContainer; final class ObjectsStorage { /** * @return ObjectDescription[] */ public static function getObjectMap(): array { $objectMap = []; foreach (Filesystem::files() as $path) { /** @var ObjectDescription|null $description */ $description = ServiceContainer::$descriptionClass::make($path); if ($description === null) { continue; } // save memory $description->stmts = []; $objectMap[$description->name] = $description; } return $objectMap; } }
